The Vuista were originally ascendants of the Obrodians, however a civil war broke out over 100 years ago over the use of the arcane crystal. Although, the Vuista were unable to obtain the arcane crystal for themselves, they were able to separate from the southern region and maintain independence against the Obrodians. Recently, the Vuista have uncovered a new magic crystal known as the “Occult Crystal”. The occult crystal allowed extremely easier blood infusions as a host would only need a small trace of the energy to harness it’s energy because the energy itself fed on blood to grow exponentially. This allowed any user to use raw magical power without the need for long training and discipline. However, because the occult energy fed on blood, it would continue to feed until the user was drained from one’s own blood. This caused the user’s flesh to deteriorate until there was nothing left leaving them a soulless husk. The Vuista used this to their advantage and infused the blood of ordinary foot soldier sending them to the frontlines against the Obrodians. The Obrodians army was much stronger and organized than the Vuista, but the charge of so many magic users took its toll on the Obrodians when the Vuista finally broke into Obrodian territory just a little over a year ago. The arcanist program was accelerated and students were sent into action before graduation. The top students were sent to the more important locations while the possible graduates were sent on patrol missions or small garrisons. You are one of these students. You are sent away from the frontlines and more towards the south to a small mining town of Auguston. An arcanist student was sent there 6 months ago to maintain a steady shipment of iron for the war efforts and to stop any troll incursions to the west from what’s known as “Monster Mountain” where tribes of monsters make regular raids against Obrodian settlements. However, ore shipment has stopped 3 months ago and any attempt for communication has failed. You are given full jurisdiction of Auguston, tasked with the investigation and reinstatement of Auguston’s ore shipments. Build new buildings which offer new followers, resources, and crafting recipes. Upgrade existing buildings to gain enhanced versions. Recruit citizens and travelers to help you fight in battle. Discover unique followers and gain their loyalty. Find and harvest materials to craft battle essentials. Fight various people and creatures during your adventure. Discover new passages and entrances. Stayed tuned regularly as we will be implementing new updates regularly, including new features not yet mentioned. Thank you for taking the time to view our Early Access Game and we appreciate your business and feedback. The project’s success relies on the involvement of the community and we hope you like the direction we are headed in with Blood of Magic. Made By stoneworks Games Stone Aged Gaming-

title: Ticktock
description: Ticktock is a deceptively fast-paced arcade action game. Think fast; every fleeting second may be your last. Survive waves of monsters. Survive all 11 stages. Survive until the end . Ticktock is a unique action arcade avoidance game, where time pauses to give you a moment to evaluate the situation and plan your next move. With five different monsters to fend off, and 11 different stages of increasing difficulty, a great challenge lies ahead. Each stage and monster is uniquely hand-crafted to be predictable, yet complex. Six different pieces play alongside each stage, complementing the aesthetic of the gameplay to form a complete experience. Will you be able to survive? How long can you survive?

title: Talewind
description: What is Talewind? Talewind is a VERY HARD 2D platformer with the wind as a core mechanic, mostly suited for hardcore platforming fans and completionists. You can jump, glide and move trough wind tunnels in order to travel across the levels. Play through FIVE different worlds filled with beautiful hand-painted environments. Don't let its looks fool you, you are going to need some serious mechanical skills to reach the end. The Story You live in a small village at the bottom of a mountain. This mountain is not like the others though. Surrounding it, strong winds never cease to blow. To this village the wind is a blessing, a never ending source of energy essential to everyday life. But one day, the wind gets weaker and starts to fade. You set off on a journey to climb the mountain and find out what is happening.

title: Kogarashi
description: Kogarashi tells the story of Abura Akago, a fire demon that lived ignoring the ice demon Yuki Onna and her evil deeds, until one day she went too far and stole the soul of his mother. At that moment Abura Akago armed with his flaming sword decided to free the region from the evil ice spirit and her demon army. 3D Hack N’ Slash combat against several enemy types that will test your skills in different ways. Epic battle against a unique final boss. Two final attacks that will let you execute your enemies or unleash a fiery dragon that will push all foes away. Beautiful frozen medieval Japanese aesthetic style, featuring an original soundtrack. Optional collectibles revealing the lore of the world. This game was developed as a student project at DigiPen Institute of Technology Europe - Bilbao and was created for educational purposes only. Please check out our publisher page for more information.

title: Synth Swinger
description: Are you Ready to Swing? This upcoming first-person platformer very much has the visual appeal and sheer electricity of gameplay. As for its mechanics, it will feature swinging via grapple, jumping, and wall-running, all of which are set in an amazing neo-lit world. Early Access Includes Full playable game and training area for you to further explore your skills.

title: Märchen Kanna
description: More about Marchenkanna ・The RPG that travels through a world with a picture book-like ambience. 　Developed by one person, including graphics and music. ・The story takes place in a peaceful world where wizards live. 　The whole picture of the world is gradually revealed. What is hidden in the shadows? ・ In battle scenes, an unusual system that specifies the shape and range of attacks according to the placement of enemies. 　You can think about it carefully, or you don't have to think about it. It can be enjoyed by beginners and gamers alike! ・It takes about 5~6 hours to clear. There is no scenario branching, so you can play easily and quickly. 　Please enjoy this work with a lot of fun and excitement. Other ・ There are some slightly shocking scenes! (Contains horror elements, anxiety expressions, mild gore expressions, expressions related to suicide, expressions reminiscent of war, and scenes in which weapons are used) ・ Permission is not required for the act of earning money through play video distribution, etc. Please feel free to do so. ・All can be played for free. There are no plans to add paid content.

title: Nancy Drew®: Danger by Design
description: Nancy Drew®: Danger by Design is a first-person perspective, point-and-click adventure game. The player is Nancy Drew and has to solve a mystery. Explore rich environments for clues, interrogate suspects, and solve puzzles and mini-games. Fashion designer Minette might be at the height of her career, but rumors have been flying about her bizarre behavior. Is this designer diva coming apart at the seams, or is someone keeping her spring collection unfashionably behind schedule? It’s up to you, as Nancy Drew, to travel to Paris for an internship and sew up this case in style! Discover the inner workings of the fashion industry. Experience Parisian life—dining at a café, translating French, and riding the Metro. Skin dive and snoop around the creepy catacombs. Haggle with merchants for souvenirs. Solve puzzles based on concocting parfaits, developing photos, and completing circuit boards. Erase mistakes by using the ‘Second Chance’ feature.   About The Nancy Drew Adventure Series The original #1 selling PC adventure series.

title: ITRP _ Gas Prison
description: In fact, a short description of this game has deceived you. You will be required not only to be attentive, but also to react in a timely manner, to have intelligence and a good memory. ITRP _ Gas Prison will allow you to arrange a little test. You will find yourself in a system of cells, each of which can slam and poison you with gas. Keep an eye on the indicators to prevent this. However, the conditions under which you will be placed will not allow you to save all cells. Some will have to be sacrificed. And there are few useless ones among them: Some contain maps or timers. Some stores interactive monitors for system management. Some just has a lot of passages. The game is NOT designed to test your reflexes, reaction, accuracy or ...patience. It is designed to test your attentiveness, intelligence, ability to think ahead. Even if you need time to get used to and remember the location of the functional points, nevertheless, you will learn the detailed rules inside.

title: Desolation Tycoon
description: The world has ended, but life moves on. Your home is a wasteland scoured by winds blowing in from a caustic sea. Most large mammals are extinct, and insects have filled their roles. You are a merchant traveling this land in search of profit. Each character you play starts with a randomly generated history and traits. And eventually, each character's career will come to an end — whether through successful retirement or tragic death. The game remembers everything you do, and the world is persistent across characters. As a consequence of your actions, civilization will slowly grow and rebuild. Accomplishments accrued across any number of characters will unlock new cities, new crew units, new challenges, and so on. There is no fixed storyline. Instead, you have a setting, a set of gameplay mechanics, and complete freedom to do with that what you will. Core features: Travel, trade, and defend your cargo from dangers. Improve your skills through usage. Find and explore places that are worth plundering. Build relationships with city notables, and co-operate with them on various schemes. Rebuild a persistent world across multiple lifetimes. Make trade-offs in encounters that are purely decision-driven, and avoid grindy minigames. Enjoy a high-information user interface that doesn't ask you to remember things unnecessarily. Example challenges: Local climate calamities. Giant insects, bandits, and much worse. Each character will automatically retire if they live long enough; this does not leave enough time to develop all possible skills. Networks of supply and demand are randomized between playthroughs. You can't stay in a trade route rut, because trading with the same cities too much will make it less profitable. You and your crew can become injured or sick — and possibly die as a result. The locals that you trade and scheme with have minds of their own, and may betray you. Performance-enhancing symbiotes may seem like a great idea, but can lead to unfortunate side-effects. Oh, and there are also demons. They complicate everything. This is not an action-oriented game. Time doesn't pass unless you're doing something, and there are no real-time challenges. Instead, gameplay is strictly about the making of intelligent trade-offs in an open-world setting with many potential courses of action.

title: Waves Of Death VR
description: Waves of Death VR Kill Or Be Killed! Following a tragic error by scientists working for the army, a viral compound, never before seen, spreads across the city, bringing the dead back to life. All the dead… Ever since, terror has gripped the area, prey to sudden attacks from zombies, skeletons and genetically modified monsters, who have escaped from the cemeteries and a secret army laboratory to devour the population. Jake has just received a call from his friend Lilly whose house is surrounded by the living- dead. The young man will have to cross the city to save his loved-ones. His journey will be strewn with pitfalls. Luckily, he can call on an impressive arsenal. He has little time in which to act and to do so, he will need to eliminate the threats: zombies, skeletons, the bosses… A whole world of terror, coming straight out of hell. The countdown begins ! Waves of Death VR is a first person shooter game (FPS). Developed on Unreal Engine® 4, also available in a conventional version on Steam under the name of Waves of Death. This game of “survival” with a time limit to increase the stress of the player has 26 levels in which to reach the highest score. The player has to advance and survive against hordes of zombies, skeletons and bloodthirsty bosses, ever more powerful and resistant. The interface is easy to use. This is a classic HUD. Particular work has gone into meta-representations (e.g. hits and blood). There are two levels of difficulty. WEAPONS Throughout the adventure, the player is offered new weapons, always more powerful and more effective. These weapons are unlocked at the end of the winning game and, above all, according to the number of points obtained. ENEMIES Enemies are numerous and come in three categories. Zombies, skeletons and the Bosses. Their powers grow during the game and some of them can handle guns or have superpowers. The skeletons are generally faster and better equipped. Coming from the most ancient cemeteries, they are from an era when swords were used as weapons in battle. They wear protection, use shields and are particularly good at fighting. They are generally present in the countryside, around big cities, in villages or forests. Some, more dangerous, live in the catacombs… By definition, the zombies are slow but they move in numbers. They like to make human contact and approach Jake to try to devour him. Some are more intelligent and may use weapons, but they are rare and appear in the very last levels. They are usually present in the city or on the main roads. The Bosses are larger, more powerful and have been genetically modified by the army. They escaped from a secret laboratory and put the surrounding chaos to good use to climb to the top of the food chain. Their attacks are devastating and risk destroying you, if you are not well armed. ASSAULT WAVES Each level features 3 waves of enemies, with Bosses punctuating the adventure at strategic points. The game comprises 26 levels, with each player having to complete 78 stages to arrive at the end of the mission and so free Lilly. Polygone Games Studio Unreal Engine® 4 FPS 2 levels of difficulty. 26 maps

title: Gravity Ball
description: Test your reflexes! Gravity Ball is a game where you aim to make the best score. To do this, avoid obstacles on the path of your ball. You will only need your mouse, just click once so that your ball moves from one wall to another. Each click gives you 1 point. It is an arcade-style game that allows you to relax while watching a video or to entertain yourself while loading another game for example.

title: Miko Adventures Puffball
description: INSPIRED BY THE WORLD DESIGN OF THE SOULS-LIKE GENRE The WINNER of GDWC fan favourite (WEEK 17) Get ready to embark on an epic, fun, cute and challenging journey of Miko. Miko Adventures Puffball tells the story of an epic adventure that merges unique puzzles with challenging platforming and lots of dangers to deal with. In the world of Puffball you play as Miko, a raccoon who lost his way while wandering through the forest, Miko discovers a portal and upon touching it he finds himself in a world full of dangers. Miko is transported into another dimension and your goal is to help him find a way back home but it wont be an easy journey, are you ready for the challenges awaiting you? THE GAME WORLD Consists of 14+ massive unique levels each with their own style and challenges, every level feels like a new world to explore, each of them have different sections connecting with each other. COLLECT Collect lots of diamonds to earn different types of medals or unlock new levels. SOLVE UNIQUE PUZZLES To progress further in the level and get to new sections. FIND SECRETS There are many secrets hidden around in every corner. CHALLENGING GAMEPLAY Fight many types of monsters each have their own way to deal with. UNIQUE ART STYLE The world of Miko Adventures Puffball is full of Colors With a very cute, unique and detailed art style. REPLAY VALUE After you finish the story, there is lots of replay value in “Miko Adventures Puffball” as you go back and replay some levels to unlock certain types of medals or to unlock more achievements and get 100% completion. ABOUT CORIANDER GAMES Hi, my name is khaled Coriander Games is a one-man indie game development studio based in Egypt, Game development has always been my passion and I'm doing my best to bring fun, challenging, unique and polished games into the world, my main goal is to give you quality games. “Miko Adventures Puffball” has been in development for more than 2 years, I’m so happy to be sharing with you my biggest achievement, expect a lot more polished games to come, this is just the beginning. Thank you so much for being here.

title: Rolling Macho:Tumbling to Earth
description: Rolling Macho: Tumbling to Earth is a rolling action game where you roll and squat your way back to Earth after being stranded in space. ■Unique Controls Explore the unique and challenging 'Rotation Control Mode' where your character spins as you rotate the stick. The game starts with a standard control method, making it easy for anyone to enjoy. When you're ready, dive into the challenge of mastering the unique 'Rotation Control Mode,' where your character spins as you rotate the stick. ■Unique World There is no time to worry about why macho is in space or why he does side rolls. All you need to understand is that he is in space and must return to Earth. ■Simple Rules The only way is up! All you need is the physical strength to keep rolling and the determination to never give up. ■Various Areas As you progress, the environment changes, demanding different strategies. To survive in space, you must adapt to the situation. ■Great Music The music changes with each area and will make you feel excited. Enjoy the carefully curated soundtrack.

title: Cicadas - The IQA Edition
description: 这是一款高中恋爱题材的GALGAME，游戏剧情以小说形式呈现故事的发展，游戏里除了配有动听的音乐，主要角色还全程配有语音。在游戏进程中，玩家通过选项与动画美少女互动从而影响剧情。 ——在六年前的初夏，我的第一次人生结束了。 六年前的一场地震，失去了家人，以及大部分的记忆的少年。 被收养，接纳，拥有了一个新的名字——东方晨。 那份因记忆的空白而生出的不安，终于在回归普通的生活中一点点淡化。 平淡岁月里，逐渐忘却的记忆，与那年的蝉鸣一起，被封存在了黑暗深处。 “对不起，我还在等，在他找到我之前，我没办法和任何人在一起。” 在漫长等待的谎言中左右徘徊的少女。 “为什么，一旦有他们的介入，我喜欢的所有东西，都会变成一种折磨呢。” 在无形的沉重枷锁中渴望自由的少女。 “星星和这座城市的夜景⋯⋯区别很大⋯⋯因为⋯⋯是生和死的区别。” 在漆黑无尽的夜空中找寻光明的少女。 关于记忆的故事，伴随那一声声夏日蝉鸣，今夏，回荡在你耳边。 夏空 身高：169CM 体重：50kg 年龄：16岁 隐藏属性的青梅竹马，名正言顺的友好邻居兼同班同学。 运动神经和战斗能力均为MAX，目前的必杀技是“百八式波动拳”，杀伤力不容小觑。 虽然为人洒脱不拘小节，但内心也有小女生的一面。 一直在等人，但不知道等不等得到。 因为 ——“那些关于爱的记忆，即便只会带给人伤痛，也始终不愿将其忘却。” 沈樱 身高：155CM 体重：40KG 年龄：17岁 主人公的学霸同桌，善良的作业小帮手。 微笑是最常用的表情，身上总带着无法逾越的距离感，所以存在感稀薄。 虽然成绩很好，但平常的反应总是比人慢半拍。 无论过去未来还是现在，都喜欢看星星。 因为 ——“极致的绝望是漆黑的夜，渺小的希望是夜里的星。” 欧阳羽 身高：162CM 体重：46KG 年龄：15岁 成绩，外貌，家庭，似乎都完美得令人羡慕。 沉默寡言，脸上很少有笑容，总透露出令人难以接近的气场。 朋友很少，自己也并不因此而烦恼。 喜欢提拉米苏，更喜欢弹钢琴，最喜欢随心自由的弹钢琴。 因为 ——“梦想是自由的翅膀，而非禁锢的枷锁。” 东方晨 男主角，艺体生，擅长吉他，技术中上。 因为一次地震失去了大部分记忆，也因此患有较为严重的幽闭恐惧症。 性格相对稳重，对执着的东西很富有责任感，但从未有过远大的抱负。 十分珍惜目前平静的生活，因为⋯⋯ ——“我喜欢平常的每一天。” 东方信 东方晨的弟弟，上得厅堂下得厨房，长着一张很秀气的脸。 心思细腻，脾气温和，将东方晨的饮食起居打理的井井有条，不过⋯⋯ 有女朋友。 ——“冰箱里有炒饭，用微波炉热一热就能吃，切记，两分钟就够了！” 易震风 东方晨的好基友，爱好是上网和撩妹，资深留级生。 虽然生得一张好皮相，但拥有一张唯恐天下不乱的嘴，以及厚可比城墙的脸皮，唯一的克星是夏空。 钱包经常被一群人拿来开小灶。 ——“可⋯⋯恶⋯⋯我⋯⋯我的⋯⋯钱包⋯⋯对⋯⋯对不起⋯⋯我没能⋯⋯守护你⋯⋯。” 林玉萧 东方信的女朋友，家世不错，文静有礼貌的乖乖女。 心地善良，有些腼腆，虽然话不多，但行动力很强。 ——“只要你们需要，我随时都会帮忙。” 欧阳潇 欧阳羽的父亲，成功人士。 将自己的原则贯彻始终，是个原则性很强的人。 ——“这是你所作的决定，我会支持你，但你必须好好努力，必须成为站在顶端的那个人。”

title: Soulestination
description: Soulestination' is a magic tower (fixed-value strategy RPG) game that incorporates meta elements. Players need to control Rovia as the Savior, fight the enemy in the process of exploring the world, and gradually see the essence of the world. The girl Rovia was summoned to the world 'Kaladore' and told that she was the new Savior of this world. She accepted the task of saving the world, set off for the Sacred Place in the north of the world. Along the way, she witnessed what is happening in this world on the verge of destruction. At the same time, she will also witness the secrets hidden behind... Features · More than 300 well-designed maps, more than 20 different styles of areas · Revealing the essence of the world as you explore further · More than 200 enemies, with dozens of different skills. You need to organize strategies for each enemy with unique skills · Nearly 30 unique Evil Soul bosses, which require a certain strategy to reduce the damage taken in defeating them. · Dozens of unique Weapons and Soul Artifacts. There are countless ways to beat the game. · 3 modes of difficulty are carefully balanced, allowing both casual players and hardcore players to enjoy the strategy of this game. · Playtime of more than 10 hours. It will surely bring you a strategic feast. · Puzzles with metagame element. Be surprised by them! Warning: Important decisions will have permanent consequences. Please make every decision in the plot carefully. This game contains a demo (3 h+) with the content of the first chapter of the game. If you are not sure whether the game is worth buying, it is recommended to try the demo first. You may join the discord by link

title: Imaginary Chaos Fight
description: Imaginary Chaos Fight is a 2D PvP fighting game where each character has unique abilities and mechanics that add a new layer of strategy to each match. Each of the six fighters presents distinct advantages and disadvantages: while some have powerful but slow attacks, others rely on speed and agile moves to dodge and counterattack. The abilities of each character are carefully designed to either complement or counter each other in combat, offering a dynamic experience full of strategic possibilities. Additionally, the game features unique and interactive maps, such as Jungle and Vulcan, which add exclusive mechanics to the battlefield. In the Jungle map, players are immersed in a dense forest with strategically positioned teleportation portals, allowing for quick movement between distant points on the map and surprising opponents. In the Vulcan map, players face a terrain filled with active geysers that provide powerful boosts for those who know how to use them strategically. These geysers allow players to quickly reach elevated areas, escape attacks, or surprise opponents with unexpected moves. Imaginary Chaos Fight combines these character and environment mechanics to create an intense and unpredictable combat experience, where character choice and map adaptation are crucial to achieving victory.

title: Amigo: Kebab Simulator
description: Friend! Welcome to my local Doner Kebabs. I need your help to run my business while I'm away. You will have to take care of placing the orders, keeping the premises clean and properly serving the customers; because these bastards get involved in putting negative reviews and in the end the health workers close the business for me. Although illo, they say that if you only have positive reviews they give you a prize with a piece of money, but I have never seen one of those in my life. If you need it, you can improve the place by buying more furniture. Well, I'll leave you with the Shawarma, you're already telling me. We are aware that the game has bugs, all bugs or improvements will be patched

title: Kitchinko
description: Join the Kitchen Crew as they make different meals from around the world! In this arcade game, fire away at the pegs on screen to be able to clear out the red plus pegs, and advance to different levels! Race to get the fastest time and brag to your friends! Shoot shots clearing some or all the pegs on screen. As you progress unlock access to more Appliances (and eventually other Kitchen Crew members) to give you different types of power ups for your shots. Power ups unlocked by clearing Frowny/Smiley faced blue pegs. Reveal different meals made by the Kitchen Crew with: - 21 Levels! + Make 7 Levels of your own! - Custom Level editor! - 3 Kitchen Appliances! - Up to 3 Stars awarded for beating each level! !(Intend to increase all the above as we continue to develop through Early Access) You get to shoot balls from the top of a screen down into arrays of pegs. The balls clear pegs that they hit after the ball is gone. If you clear all the red plus pegs before you are out of pegs you beat the level and can advance on to another level! If you don't clear all the red plus pegs, you'll need to retry the level until you have cleared the red plus pegs from that level. By hitting enough pegs to get 700 points you'll early an extra ball back, and you can earn a ball back by having the last shot ball go into the Ball Pot at the bottom of the level.

title: HauntedManager
description: 『HauntedManager』 is a story about opening a haunted house with ghost staff, where the goal is to ensure no one ever reaches the end. Enjoy a primitive top-down tower defense experience while managing admission restrictions and budget. Description You are the manager of a haunted house. Frighten your guests into leaving before they reach the goal. Command the playful ghost staff. Guide guests who start crying to the exit, so they don't ruin the experience for others. Occasionally, elite ghosts from the main mansion will come to harass you. You can either fend them off or recruit them. Other Information A short game lasting 2-3 hours. An easy mode is available. Includes some hand-drawn animations. Featured Ghost Staff Doppelgänger: Not even they know whose doppelgänger they are. Essentially just a human. Blakra: The embodiment of the once-famous Blakra. Now too well-known to scare anyone. Hachishaku: Despite being only seven shaku tall, they make up for it with physical prowess. They're also good at basketball. And many more!

title: RoomNo.404
description: 《404号房间》是一款都市生活题材的视觉小说。 实习中的大学女生尉迟语住入租价低廉的老旧小区后竟遭遇灵异事件， 与幽灵共用一副身体，两周后二人便会一并烟消云散——命运被系在一根绳上的两位女孩究竟会何去何从？ 了解尉迟语以及她身边的人，将所有人的经历拼接起来，一睹故事的全貌。 随着故事的推进寻找脱险之法，达成完全不同的结局。 借顷刻光阴便洞察来往过客未免痴想，但愿这相遇并非竹篮打水的枉然， 彼此误解，互相温暖，和萍水相逢的同旅者继续漫步下去，亦或是，带着笑容道别。 在世纪交替的岁月里诞生的年轻人们，将要把这段回忆讲给你听。 游戏特点： 文本内容方面，以视觉小说为载体，但相较于常见的类型小说选题，更倾向于文学小说的表达。 从情景剧风格的讽刺小品中品尝“或许能让舌头试出咖啡味道”的黑色幽默。 图像内容方面，在故事推进至重要情节时采用手绘风格漫画演出的表现形式。 根据玩家的选择，呈现不同的漫画分镜。 游戏内容： 三条不同的故事线，18种不同的结局。 文本约22万字，剧情漫画154张。 玩家交流QQ群：913418728 期待着在小小房间里与您的相遇。

title: Fear deeps
description: Game Description: This is a horror game. You wake up from a room and see a letter written by Lily. The content of the letter tells the story of Lily's work. Because Lily changed the patient's medicine by mistake, the patient's condition became more serious, so Lily was expelled from the hospital. Lily changed her new job and then went to a nursing home, but who knows that there are even more bizarre things here. Lily became more and more wrong to write to you, but she was finally caught by the dean! Lily had no choice but to send you the last letter for help. After you received it, you went to the nursing home to save Lily! You need to manipulate the protagonist to explore the key in the nursing home, step by step until you open the basement door and go to Lily's trapped room to save her, but you should always be alert to the terrible monsters hiding in the nursing home! Game Operations Move: WASD, Observe: Mouse, Flashlight: If you have a battery, press F to turn on and off the flashlight, Hide: If you are hunted by a terrible monster you can press Ctrl to crouch under the table, Interaction: There are some items in the game that can be interacted with, you can press E to interact, Inhibitor: If you have an inhibitor, you can press the left mouse button to eject, Monsters: Monsters patrol around every corner, keep an eye out for your room door closed! Monsters have keen vision, and if they are targeted, they will go out of their way to hunt you down! Game Story: In the beautiful morning, you receive a letter from Lily, who tells you that she has changed jobs and works as a doctor on call at a psychiatric nursing home. And tells you to wait for her to come back, but the good times don't last long, and as she works in the nursing home for more and more time, Lily discovers something strange. The patient would make strange noises at night, and Lily initially thought that the patient was using the wrong medicine, until she saw the dean's strange behavior. Unexpectedly, Lily is discovered and imprisoned by the dean, and Lily does everything she can to send you one last letter... Psychiatric Sanatorium: You bravely enter the spiritual sanatorium, a place full of horrors and unknowns. The gloomy and terrifying atmosphere of the madhouse symbolizes the fear and madness that lies deep within the human heart! Dean's Experiment: The Dean's human experiments symbolize interference and desecration of order, reflecting the human desire for power and control, as well as the boundaries of scientific ethics. Variation: Tom's mutation is not only an outward physical change, but also a profound transformation of his inner world, from an ordinary person to an existence with supernatural powers. Inner Storm: The storm symbolizes the wild forces of nature, as well as the turmoil of the protagonist's inner world. The appearance of the storm coincides with the moment of Tom's physical mutation, symbolizing a drastic change in his identity and fate. In the midst of the storm, Tom begins to feel the mutation of his body, and this fear and uncertainty about his identity and future further exacerbates his inner storm. Not only does he have to face the pain of losing his lover, but he also has to face the fear that he could turn into a monster.

title: Anima Gate of Memories: I&II Remaster
description: Anima Gate of Memories I&II Remaster brings together two acclaimed action RPGs in one enhanced game! Anima is a third-person action RPG that weaves together two fates—one of a legendary monster and a mysterious girl with no memory of her past, the other of an immortal soul cursed to wander the world forever. Their existence will take an unexpected turn when they discover that all of them have been involved in something sinister, a war in the shadows in which they will have an involuntary leading role in opposing sides of the table. Experience the original Anima: Gate of Memories and its companion story Anima: The Nameless Chronicles — both fully remastered with improved visuals and gameplay. Explore a rich fantasy universe inspired by the Anima Beyond Fantasy tabletop RPG saga, filled with deep lore, fast-paced combat, and branching storylines shaped by your choices. Whether you're new to the saga or returning, this is the ultimate way to discover the world of Anima. Features A deep story. Uncover the secrets of the Tower of Arcane in a mysterious tale where nothing is as it seems. Your choices shape the journey, and your actions determine the fate of those within. A combat system which combines RPG elements with fast paced action. Unleash spectacular and dynamic move chains with the Dual System — seamlessly switch between characters with a single button to create thrilling combos. An interconnected world full of unique locations made of memories. Travel through the tower of Arcane discovering its secrets. Each character has a large set of special skills that you will be able to develop and customize as in a traditional RPG.

title: PAYDAY 3
description: Step out of retirement back into the life of crime in the shoes of the Payday Gang, the envy of their peers and the nightmare of law-enforcement wherever they go. Several years after the crew’s reign of terror over Washington DC has ended, they assemble once again to deal with the threat that roused them out of early retirement. The legendary Payday Crew, dreaded by the law and underworld alike, is back. Ripped from their peaceful retirement to rejoin the criminal world by a new threat, one born from the chaos the Crew left in their wake. In order to identify and crush this new threat, the Crew is leaving their Washington DC roots behind them and moving to New York City. A new location will bring with it new challenges, but also new opportunities for a heister with a plan. Give outlet to your greed and let loose in PAYDAY 3. In addition to gold, cash and jewelry and any other valuables they might come across, you’ll be able to build a sizable collection of weapons, cosmetics and accolades. It won’t be as simple as showing up and gaining goodies. You’ll have to work hard and plan smart to get away with as much loot as possible. Gain experience, unlock new skills and gain proficiency in weapons to steadily grow your power to handle the tougher challenges. A professional heister knows it takes planning, hard work and a good amount of luck in order to execute a successful heist. In PAYDAY 3 the choice is put in the hands of the players, deciding how to tackle the heist, whether you sneak or go in guns blazing, whether you let your hostages go or keep them around as pawns, whether you go at it alone or bring friends. The choices are endless and in your hands, they will vastly change how the game plays. Not just anyone is worthy of standing at your side for something as important as a heist. Likewise, PAYDAY 3 is best enjoyed with close friends in mind, whether you bring them from your childhood or make them along the road. The PAYDAY-series has always valued the bonds made through hardship and tries to reflect that in the actions and words of our heisters while in the game, and through our community while on the outside.

title: HER TREES : THE PUZZLE HOUSE
description: HER TREES : THE PUZZLE HOUSE is a unique point-and-click puzzle game where you move and combine objects to solve puzzles. Uncover the mysteries of this peculiar room. 　 This is the second installment in the series, but you can start playing from here without any issues. features: ■​A new puzzle experience unlike any other game. ■All puzzles are intuitive; no tedious calculations or notes required. ■Access to hints and answers ■Approximate playtime: 1.5 hours 　 ■Dark storybook-like ambiance, a surreal dreamworld ■Unique hand-drawn graphics ■Serene ambient sound 　 ■A non-verbal game ■Since it's entirely monochrome, there are no puzzles that rely on color perception. ■No puzzles involve sound.

title: The Legend of Azarias Rebirth
description: Step into the shoes of Angel Raphael in this immersive and action-packed first-person dungeon crawler. Travel through 24 floors, each presenting a new challenge to overcome with new demons to fight. Engage in intense combat against a variety of demonic enemies, with the strategy and strength behind them increasing with each new floor. Uncover hidden side quests that offer new power to destroy anything in your path. Master the drain combat system! Take on loads of demon side quests to get new armor, weapons, and skills! Travel the 24 floors and discover all the hidden secrets! Fight against 157 unique enemies and bosses! 10–20 hours worth of gameplay. Will you rise to the challenge and defeat Asmodeus?

title: Take Care VR
description: Immerse yourself in the captivating world of 'Take Care VR' and get ready for an unforgettable adventure inspired by the classics! WHERE IS SHE? Your mission is to rescue a mysterious woman in dire need as you navigate through treacherous landscapes infested with relentless hordes of zombies. Prepare to be enthralled by meticulously designed environments, ranging from eerie and desolate landscapes to sinister dungeons. THEY ARE HERE! Arm yourself with a variety of weapons, including knives, your pistol and a trusty crowbar, as you engage in pulse-pounding battles against the undead. To progress, you'll need to showcase your problem-solving skills by unraveling intricate puzzles and traversing labyrinthine levels that will push your limits. Are you ready to face the ultimate challenge? Get 'Take Care VR' today and embark on an adrenaline-fueled journey that will test your skills, nerve, and determination to their limits. HIGHLIGHTS Immerse yourself in a captivating VR world with a mysterious rescue mission. Battle against zombies using a variety of weapons. Solve puzzles and navigate labyrinthine levels. Collect and strategically use items throughout the game. Improve your skills at the tryout. Spatial 3D audio provides a realistic experience. Accessibility options for custom player or inventory height. (whole game can be played seated)

title: Super Squidlit
description: Super Squidlit imitates the Game Boy™ Color's capabilities and limitations for a squishy adventure! The colorful world of Squishu and its invertebrate inhabitants need your help! Play as Plip and your old foe, Skwit Skwot, as you set sail to banish a great evil. - Squip your way through the islands of Squishu as Plip, a wee squidlit that can double jump to ink on things below you! - Plip's new roll tackle lets you manipulate foes and gain a burst of speed! - Blast your way through enemies as the wizardly Skwit Skwot, GOD EMPEROR, in ray-casting 3D RPG levels! - Meet lots of goofy Squidlits! Like the first Squidlit game did with the Game Boy™, Super Squidlit adheres to the limitations of the Game Boy™ Color: * No more than 10 sprites in a horizontal line * No more than 40 sprites at any time * 3 colors per sprite * 160 x 144 pixel resolution * 4 sound channels for music and SFX * All sounds were recorded on a real Game Boy™ Color! Can you guide Plip and Skwit Skwot to victory and save Squishu?

title: Gumbowl's Adventure
description: description Gumbowl’s Adventure is a 2D Platformer with loads of stuff to explore . You play as the main character “Gumbowl” and your goal is to find him some more gumballs. You will meet all of Gumbowl’s friends who are eager to help you through… whatever necessary to get you those gumballs. I wish you luck on your journey! features Rhythm Games Parkour Exploration story Boss Battles A Whole Lot Of Caves

title: 最后四人-The last four
description: Once happy life is so good, 'woke up' after the girl found she in the empty base. Zombies? The cat ~ the zombie in the base! Get out of here and head for Happiness! Whether the girl can achieve his wish, What's going on at the base? Solve the puzzle, head to the happiness of memory! About Actor AiLiSi Her silvery hair shone in the sun like a fairy in the flowers. It was a happy family of three, and she was a happy daughter. She She had attempted suicide, met the only he. That was the moment when time really began to flow. Happy lovers, as if to make the suffering has a meaning. Mr.Meow Cute cat, is a healing spirit. It doesn't connect with his language, but there's no question of their intimate connection. Mourner -- a genius scientist. Simple nickname, is the most true portrayal of him. The great cause of advancing human society is not yet complete, but the present continuous state is the source of his happiness. About games It's a AVG game, investigating and finding items. The big mystery is what happened on the base? Before you can figure out the puzzle, you face starvation and death threats, and must find food quickly. And when you find food... Game duration About 1 hour. Operation method Arrow key movement Spaces confirm B/Click the avatar icon open the backpack M/Click the backpack icon open the menu F4 Full-screen switchover 关注我们 玩家交流群（Q）：948843464 B站ID：零或 爱发电ID：零或

title: Go! Sloth
description: A sloth is crossing the road. That's it… but it's harder than it looks. Control a leisurely sloth powered by physics, and make it across the road without wasting your HP (stamina). A short, lighthearted game that's perfect for a quick break. If you clear it, try beating your high score!

title: The Happy Hereafter
description: Welcome to The Happy Hereafter, a casual sim in which you guide the newly dead as they build an afterlife for themselves and their fellow lost souls. Possessing uncanny management skills, you'll control a legion of zany characters as they arrive at their eternal destination and settle in. There will be no rest for the wickedly funny as you put them to work building houses, harvesting resources and earning money to build a village to rival Paradise. Explore weird but wonderful landscapes, discover cleverly hidden secrets, and complete dozens of challenging missions in your quest to create a little slice of Heaven in the underworld! Six locations Over 100 missions Dozens of wacky characters Comic book style story scenes Learn-as-you-play tutorial

title: SpriteStack
description: -- 2021 Upcoming update -- One liner about NEXT release: SpriteStack is a 3D animator/editor that combines voxels, lowpoly and sprites to make 2D game assets in form of spritesheets. Do not worry to get current version of SpriteStack - it's the one that will get updated with all the new features you can read about there . After the update the price will go up so it's the best moment to get it - also it helps me to focus on SpriteStack instead of looking for funds. -- Old (current) version description -- SpriteStack is a 3d pixelart editor based on sprite stacking technique. It's a special kind of voxel editor suited for 2D artists where the model is drawn layer by layer like a pixelart. Featuring handcrafted retro renderer and experimental animation support. Examples Editor Each model is made of 2D slices that create a 3D volume when put on top of each other. Animator Animation support is experimental but it can already yeld nice results. Exporter Top notch exporter featuring unique low resolution renderer stylized to look like pixelart. It can output 2D spritesheets, slices for spritestacking or .vox models that can be later converted to many popular 3D formats. MagicaVoxel support Thanks to two-way MagicaVoxel integration you are not bound to use the spritestacking editor. You can also render your existing .vox models in my retro rendering engine or get your spritestacks converted to formats like OBJ.

title: SHADE The Border Collie Flycatcher
description: SHADE The Border Collie Flycatcher is an exciting point and shoot game that challenges players to catch as many flies as possible. With simple and intuitive gameplay and colorful graphics, players of all ages can enjoy this fun and engaging game. Please note that the game cannot be paused, so make sure you have uninterrupted playtime to achieve your highest score. Join Shade on this thrilling adventure and test your reflexes and precision in a fast-paced game of flycatching!

title: Lips Breaker
description: Please note!!! This game requires a front facing camera to play! “Lips Breaker” is the industry's first Arkanoid game that incorporates facial control technology. It revolutionarily uses the shape of the player's mouth as the instant form of the little ball baffle. In this game, you need to flexibly swing your lips in front of the camera to control the baffle to bounce the little ball, accurately smash the bricks to win. This is not only a challenge to reaction speed and facial expression movements, but also an unprecedented fun experience. Key features The game features 8 chapters, 9 levels each, for a total of 72 well-designed levels, each with a unique brick layout and challenges. Includes: 18 unique props, covering a variety of special effects such as buffs and debuffs. 18 special bricks, diverse in type, with different attributes and effects. 18 mechanism designs, flexibly controlled by facial expressions, highly interactive and fun. 10 creatures (including boss battles), either cute or dangerous, providing a diverse combat experience.                      ✦Unique face-controlled gameplay✦ The novel face-controlled gameplay provides excellent live broadcast effects. It can also relax the body and mind by freeing up the hands and exercising the facial muscles. ✦Sophisticated control experience✦ The real-time shape of the mouth can be used as a baffle to precisely control the bounce of the ball, testing the player's reaction speed and operating skills. ✦Rich game content and systems✦ In addition to exciting levels, it also offers a thrilling prize machine, an exhaustive illustration book and a colorful skin system. ✦Level editor and creative workshop✦ You can freely use your creativity to design levels and share them in the creative workshop to interact with other players. ✦Global leaderboard✦ Improve your ranking by challenging the fastest clearance time record and compete with players from all over the world. This is a fun and challenging Arkanoid experience. Whether you are a big fan of Arkanoid games, a game lover who wants to try a new way of playing, or a live streaming expert, you can find your own fun and sense of achievement in this game.

title: NAL Is Alive
description: Over 13 years, and over 130 games. All made by one hobbyist-turned-full-time developer. And now, for the first time, available in one cohesive package in the form of NAL Is Alive! NAL Is Alive is a compendium containing everything by NAL, released under the NALGames pseudonym between 2003 and today, wrapped up in a launcher that also universally tracks your statistics and highscores for each game*, the latter being compared against the world in Steam-exclusive online leaderboards*. Containing the good - Maddening Relapse 2! Hi Me Ro Me! Innoquous 4! Ne Touchez Pas! Prisnhax! Frankenfirearm! Lab Wagon! And the bad - Aardvark Cwm! Gemocide! Clickfire! ...and almost everything inbetween! Ever wanted to work it on a pogo stick? SohoPogoHo hears you! Fancy going around peeing on people? Signal Failure! You can assume the role of a redhead killing your opposers of the world in Infidels, or become a little robot fixing the big robot it resides in with Titan Tighten. Need a rhythm game fix while also improving your touch typing proficiency? Bullet Hills sees you typing to the music! Need a music game that has instead has no rhythm? Melodika gets you to suck a stream of icons into a recepticle to any track of your choosing! Need to inject yourself to help forget the nightmarous legion of female stalkers planning on kissing you to death? Yeah, that's in here too with Overly Attracted Stalkers. So's the one where you're a dog in a ball unloading clips of everything from water pistols to rocket shotguns at mutant bags of blood - Lyssandra and the Amplegores. And the one where you get to play an interactive advert for a fictional Japanese dish cleaner while a man touts its superior viscosity to you, Japanese Infomercial. All of these and more, being taken through an ongoing process to bring them up to spec* - dropping the MIDI music from the really old stuff in favour of more listenable MP3s, knocking every game's resolution and FPS up to 1080p/60 (potentially again up to 4K in the future), improving their gameplay and their graphics, adding the aforementioned Steam leaderboards... you name it. It's presented in a somewhat light-hearted way, and many of the games are pretty silly, but this pack truly does represent a huge chunk of my life - everything I made independently from being an 11 year old kid that had to download Game Maker 5.0 onto a school computer and bring it home on 3.5' floppy discs thanks to the speed of my home internet, to a currently 25 year old making games and other stuff full-time. *Please note: not all games will support the update features during NAL Is Alive's Early Access development. As of writing, approx 80 games contain Steam Leaderboards, and approx 40 are completely upscaled to 1080p/60.

title: Kingdom Ascension
description: Kingdom Ascension' is a medieval-themed strategy war game. You will become a lord and build your own territory from scratch. Through resource collection, building construction, troop recruitment, exploration and adventure, you will continue to expand your territory and defend your homeland Starting from a desolate base, collect key resources such as food and materials. In the case of limited resources, you need to be prudent and reasonably allocate resources for troop training, building upgrades and technology research and development to lay the foundation for development. Develop the technology tree to improve economic efficiency and scale. Focus on upgrading the performance and role of war equipment. These key skills will have a decisive impact on the battle situation. Continuously strengthen your strength through scientific research. Create a dedicated army to resist invasion. Recruit soldiers with different characteristics and flexibly combine them according to tactical needs. The outcome of the battlefield depends on your deployment, combination of soldiers and tactical arrangements. Send troops to explore the dynamic map to discover treasures, ruins and unknown enemies. Unlock new territories through battles or acquisitions, accumulate more resources, gradually expand the territory, and respond to challenges brought by random events, with the goal of becoming a hegemon.

title: Happy Empire - A Bouquet for the Princess
description: We are proud to present our new game, into which we have put all our love for games and emotions – Happy Empire – A Bouquet for the Princess. In this game, three princes compete for the hand and heart of a beautiful Princess Leya. After having surmounted many obstacles, she regained her Happy Empire and now sits on its throne. But sadness and loneliness reign in her heart. To win her love, the princes will have to make a journey and find rare flowers to make a charming bouquet of flowers from around the world. They will face a lot of challenges and obstacles on their way. Will the princes have to help one another, or will they become enemies? Will they choose a dangerous way and collect the rarest flowers or take a short cut? What bouquet will the Princess get? It’s all up to you! More About the Game: Catchy colorful graphics Charismatic characters!!! Game as part of a big story with rich storyline 4 amazing worlds to visit 71 challenging achievements 81 unique levels This game will touch feeling of both boys and girls. Romance and challenges are intertwined in a single story of the Bouquet for the Princess game. Prove that Princess is worthy of a great and heartwarming feeling! Help princes in their challenging search and struggle for Princess Leya’s heart!

title: Countryballs at War
description: Countryballs at War Countryballs at War is a grand strategy wargame where you command a countryball nation and fight for domination. Combine turn-based empire building with real-time battles, expand your territories, and rise as the ultimate superpower. In this unique blend of strategy and action, every decision matters. Manage your diplomacy, build your armies, and prepare for unexpected challenges across a fully playable world map. Lead any countryball you want, unlock hidden nations, and carve your path to global supremacy. You will face rivals eager to claim your land, unexpected world events that force you to adapt, and the constant need to balance diplomacy with military might. Whether you prefer conquering by force or forging powerful alliances, the choice is yours. Create your own stories with the custom campaign editor , replay historical campaigns, or experiment with every nation’s unique strengths. Countryballs at War offers both casual fun for newcomers and deep strategic layers for seasoned strategy fans. All Countries Playable Choose any countryball to lead. Some nations start locked, but can be discovered and unlocked by exploring the map. Turn-Based Strategy Spend limited Attack Points and Diplomacy Points each turn to expand or negotiate. Careful planning is essential—every turn presents tough choices between conquest, diplomacy, and development. Real-Time Battles Take direct control of your armies in live combat. Coordinate attacks, call allies for reinforcements, and outmaneuver enemies with superior tactics to achieve victory. Custom Campaign Editor Design and play your own campaigns with the in-game editor. Create scenarios, set objectives, and challenge yourself or the community with unique stories. Campaigns Relive key moments of history through official campaigns. From great wars to unique scenarios, each campaign offers a fresh challenge and perspective. Other Features Diplomacy & Conquest : Declare war, sign treaties, form alliances, and puppet nations. Unique Units & Upgrades : Train infantry, artillery, and nation-specific units. World Events & Challenges : React to dynamic events like pirate invasions. Offline Single-Player : Enjoy the full game offline, anytime, anywhere. Community & Support The game is updated with new content, units, and improvements. Join the community on Discord to share feedback, discuss strategies, and stay up to date with the latest news. Credits Map Music: “Gates of Glory” by Alexander Nakarada – Licensed under CC BY 4.0

title: Bingo VR
description: Aliens. They showed up uninvited. They are taking over. They are everywhere. Earthlings are in trouble. They need to push back and take the fight back to them, to the alien home-world. A stealth super-weapon developed at Area 51 has been proven to deliver on the promise. What is that weapon? BINGO! Yes, a classic game of BINGO! Play One, Two, or Three BINGO cards! Flick the ball at the matching number on the card to daub. Toss a ball away from the card to discard. Connect a full line of daubs in a row, diagonal, or a column to make a BINGO and get a new card! How can BINGO! defeat aliens, you ask? It would be too complicated to explain here, but it is awe-inspiring. Aliens don't like losing, and especially when playing BINGO! Each BINGO! gets earthlings closer to the goal of defeating aliens. Each card is a ticket to success. Make your way to the alien council. Close it out.

title: Jane Austen's 8-bit Adventure
description: Classic literature meets classic gaming in Jane Austen's 8-bit Adventure! This 2D platformer stars Jane Austen, English novelist, who finds herself in an 8-bit video game. This game was developed to run on real NES hardware from the 1980s. The Steam release brings this retro experience to modern devices! Battle characters from Jane Austen's novels! Explore 8-bit England! Defeat enemies with a quill! Restore Miss Austen's books to the 8-bit library! NES ROM file included!

title: Updive
description: The timer is ticking. Updive is a colorful obstacle course game in which the player must be quick with their moving and dodging actions to reach the goal at the end of the course. Start each level off by jumping through a portal that send the player up to begin their momentum. Beat the timer, avoid moving and rotating obstacles, and fall to the next slide to eventually reach the win goal to advance to the next level. Explore 10 courses with different levels of difficulty, music and types of obstacles.

title: Undead Quest
description: Undead Quest is a VR rogue-lite wave shooter where your main weapons are a bat and a magic ball. Hit, dodge, and slash your way through thousands of fun-filled undead foes, crafting your unique skillset in every gaming session to reach the end and uncover the mystery of Undead. STORY Step into an epic journey as the student at a magical university and a rising star in the enchanted cricket league. One day, after celebrating your semi-final victory, you wake up in the forest and find yourself facing waves of quirky undead. Where did they come from? Who brought them into your world? You should figure out what’s going on. HIT, DODGE, SLASH, REPEAT Your primary weapons are a bat and a magic ball. Master your skills and kill the undead from a distance or use the environment to make a combo kill and don't forget to dodge or fend off ranged attacks UPGRADE AND BUILD ULTIMATE SKILLSET Collect the points and choose from dozens of available upgrades - Augment your ball with devastating powers, or perhaps Lay deadly traps or set explosive mines. Or maybe you're a wizard at heart? Unleash the full potential of your magical abilities with awe-inspiring gestures! Summon meteor showers, icy comets, and furious whirlwinds to obliterate your undead foes in spectacular fashion. ONE MORE RUN Uncover the mystery of the undead by completing the story mode or see how long you can survive in survival mode. The game sessions are roguelite-inspired, so each playthrough and skill set you create will be unique. 16 types of enemies and bosses 17 levels in the game, each with its own unique environment 47 upgrades and improvements to make each gaming session unique

title: Hexle
description: Hexle is a small number-guessing puzzle game based on Sudoku! Each number can only appear once per line and per 4x4 square, but also binary restrictions apply inside of each square, limiting the numbers that can be placed on any one tile. Learn Hexle's rules with the game's introduction and then go forth completing generated puzzles in various difficulties. Come back every day to solve the daily challenges or to tackle the weekly 16x16 megaboards! As you complete puzzle grids you will unlock new color palettes to change the mood of the game! (light and dark palettes are available from the start) You can stop playing at any time and continue your puzzle later. There is one save slot per difficulty which you may continue or reset at any time. The game plays entirely with the mouse.

title: Quackdzilla: Pool Cleaning Simulator
description: Feel the specific atmosphere and humor of the Pool Cleaning Simulator. Take on the role of a pool boy and discover what fate awaits you in Quackdzilla: Pool Cleaning Simulator 🦆Quackdzilla: Pool Cleaning Simulator 🦆 is a free-to-play prologue of Pool Cleaning Simulator. The game aims to familiarize you with the topic of the full game, its atmosphere, humor, and the specifics of the work of a pool cleaner. Inside you can play on 3 very different levels: Hotel Part 1, 'Big Tommy' Part 1, and Part 3. Welcome to Quackdzilla: Pool Cleaning Simulator . Relax, play, and have fun!

title: 对影世界
description: Platformer Puzzle Adventure Traverse intertwined parallel dimensions Utilize unique tools to reach the end Alter the world's state and unveil its secrets

title: Reanimation Inc.
description: Interested in medicine? Then this game is for you! Faster - provide venous access, charge the defibrillator and chase! Reanimation inc is a completely realistic simulation - real urgent conditions and diseases, real protocols of care used in an ambulance, realistic simulation of the body! Do you like realistic games about medicine and simulators, games you need to think about? You 'll be happy! The game features a real ECG monitor that shows ECG, HCC, pressure, Pleth, blood saturation with oxygen (oxygenation) SpO2 How can I help a patient without real knowledge? In this medical simulator I carefully worked out the system of theory - it is submitted simplified, but explains almost all manipulations carried out by paramedics and ambulance doctors. What 's interesting about this medical resuscitation and ambulance simulator? 'An idea. I decided to create the most realistic ambulance simulator that can be available to explain to the player the body 's device, first aid algorithms and medical care. I know everything in the world can be explained! Who knows - perhaps thanks to Reanimation inc one of the players recognizes a stroke and will call an ambulance, saved life. Defibrillation. Yes! You learn how a defibrillator actually works and use it a lot of times! Learn what is meant by 'cardiac arrest,' learn to fibrillate ventricular, atrial, asystolia, heart attack on ECG. - Resuscitation. You will have to carry out CPR (indirect heart massage, make IVL artificial lung ventilation, administer drugs, defibrillate), urgently take the patient by ambulance to the hospital. - Realism. I was advised by doctors, paramedics, ambulance workers. Medical students took part in the testing. 22 diseases, 17 drugs, 8 actions, studies. Real medical care algorithms, real resuscitation. - Huge number of medical improvements! Improvements to ambulances Defibrillator Enhancements Opening of new medical courses Lung ventilation improvements Improving endurance with indirect heart massage Bleeding stop improvements Purchase of medicines Drip Improvements - States What medical simulator can do without real diseases? There are 22 of them in the game! By the way, it 's not that easy to diagnose them. Myocardial infarction (you will have to determine it by ECG and distinguish it from angina) Cardiac arrest THELA, pulmonary swelling Bleeding, including internal Anaphylactic shock Stroke And many, many others! - Medicines Do you know why adrenaline is used? And what to use in case of stroke or exacerbation of COPD? In the game a huge number of drugs for all cases of life! You 'll have to learn a lot of the knowledge of an ambulance doctor to save a patient. - Gameplay What can Reanimation inc - a biomedical simulation strategy - offer? You have to become an ambulance doctor - go on calls, diagnose the disease, urgently provide assistance! Sometimes, the patient 's condition is so severe that it 's no longer possible to help him - the deadly disease won 't wait. Every patient is unique. Every disease is generated accidentally. So your passing of Reanimation inc will be unique! Features: Reanimation inc is a relistic bio medical strategy simulator. Great graphics! Reanimation inc is a realistic anatomy and device of the body. 3D models of ambulances! Reanimation inc are real Ambulance algorithms! The medical theory in Reanimation inc is broken down into courses and given to the player gradually. To you precisely there will be interesting Reanimation if you the physician: the doctor, the student, the paramedic or just you are interested in medicine or you love simulators. Reanimation inc contains a large amount of drugs! Number of diseases in Reanimation inc - 22! Reanimation inc has real defibrillation, IVL and SLR!

title: Gelluloid Domination
description: A fast-paced strategy game of fantasy biology. Start with a single fragile cell and expand across the network, assimilating rivals to grow your gel-powered army. Evolve mutations, unlock new abilities, and fight off deadly pathogens. Adapt and conquer, expand or be consumed. Every decision shapes the network — will you achieve total domination? Intuitive yet Demanding: This is a minimalist strategy game. You start with simple mechanics: transfer gel to assimilate cells and manage gel production , but when and where you act changes everything. Watch your opponents, time your moves, and adapt to their strategies. With a variety of cell types, network layouts, and upgrades, every match plays out differently. Experiment, strategize, and stay one step ahead. Over 80 Hand Crafted Missions with Unique Goals: All missions have been designed with pen and paper to offer a diverse set of challenges, requiring you to adapt and learn new strategies. Beyond classic domination, you’ll face: Survival Mode – Hold out against viral swarms. Reservoir Fill – Gather enough gel in a 'tank' cell. Race Mode – Get to the target before your opponents. More unique objectives to challenge your tactical thinking. Gel Technologies – Bio-engineer Your Arsenal: Find DNA strands to mutate , evolve , and enhance your cells: Mutations: Transform your gel into deadly medusa, spike, or explosive forms. Mutate defensive turrets to shoot down incoming viruses. Evolutions: Passive boosts to production, speed, and efficiency. Nano-Boosts: Strategic “abilities” that shift the tide – slow opponents, disrupt production, or attract viruses to enemy cells. Specialized Cells & Strategic Expansion: Some cells offer key advantages, while others can leave you exposed— expand wisely to secure the best cells before your opponents do. Beyond the basic cell, you'll encounter a variety of specialized types: Attack, Defense, and Production cells – Boost transfer speed, reinforce defenses, or increase gel production. Carrier cells – Move freely, transporting gel to disconnected areas for flanking attacks. Link cells – Create new connections in the network. Vortex cells – Teleport gel instantly across the network. Cycle roads and other mechanics add even more strategic depth. Fierce AI, Adjustable Difficulty Setting: AI-controlled opponents fight to dominate the network just like you, with no unfair advantages – just pure strategy. Crank up the difficulty for a heart-pounding challenge. Are challenges too hard? You can lower the simulation temperature to have an easier time, but the rewards will not be as good. Advanced Tools for Hardcore Players: Experience-enhancing functionality is available for power users, such as Continuous Send, Chain Linking and the Passive/Aggressive toggle. Cell information panels provide insight into the raw numbers driving the simulation. Be Part of the Evolution: The game is getting updates continuously. Be part of the evolution and join our Discord community to shape new features and game modes. Orbicorp Mission Statement Below is the standard issue onboarding letter. Welcome, doctor, to the Gelluloid Labs micro-life research program. We are Orbicorp , leaders in bio-tech and DNA disease analysis. We study alien life forms to enhance our medical expertise with fascinating knowledge of new cellular behaviors. Our vow is to not only heal the sick -- but go beyond that and super-charge biological functions in all humans, ensuring our race continues to dominate the known galaxies. By injecting a special type of Gel under strict laboratory conditions, we are able to study how these extraordinary alien tissues work to endure the extreme, life-threatening conditions of the far away solar systems. Our newest research produced the Green Gel, a new type of gel that can be controlled by hardware buttons and that can be seen through the microscope. As a scientist, you are trained to complete these experiments. Your reward will be in the form of Research Points which you can spend developing new technologies in the Lab. Thank you for reading this job description. Should you choose to apply for the position, your findings in Gelluloid Labs will lead to great advancements in human medicine and biological enhancements - sometime in the years to come. A beautiful and serene Lab is made at your disposal by Orbicorp for free: * * For the duration of your experiments. Orbicorp may terminate your contract without prior notice, and have a new scientist move in. The Lab is expensive to run and we can't waste any time or money. Or both! We sincerely admire your devotion. We can't wait to see your research, which will lead to human domination in the known galaxies. The CEO of Orbicorp himself, TAMN GHONTJEN JR.

title: Doll Catching Simulator
description: This is a 2D cute-style claw machine simulator, bringing you a comfortable claw machine experience. In this claw machine world, there are as many as 41 dolls with different styles and charming cuteness. Moreover, each doll is equipped with its own dedicated claw machine, allowing you to fully experience the exclusive fun of grasping. It is worth mentioning that each doll has been carefully set with 5 quality levels. The higher the quality of the doll, the lower the probability of grasping it, which undoubtedly adds more challenges and thrills to the game. In terms of control, I have simulated the changes in the strength and speed of the real claws, requiring you to consider the angle and timing when operating, just like thinking carefully in front of a real claw machine. And those cute dolls, every detail of them has been carefully crafted, as if they were truly alive. Even more interestingly, there is a cute younger sister in the game to help you hold the dolls. This considerate setting greatly enhances the immersion of the game. It seems that you are not playing alone but have a close partner sharing the happy moments of catching dolls with you. In addition, the game also provides a display cabinet. Here, you can proudly display the dolls you caught with great effort, admire their cute looks, and relive the tension and joy during the grasping. We sincerely expect you to step into this wonderful game world, enjoy the pleasure of playing heartily, and leave your beautiful memories of catching dolls!

title: True Game
description: True Game' is a Japanese suspense and reasoning of the great escape to kill works, this work of exquisite pictures, high degree of brain burning, into the sense of strong, very worth playing. Introduction to Gameplay: In the play, you play a high school student who gets caught up in a bizarre True Game. In True Game, you need to compete in different games to get chips from other people's hands. The winner gets ten million dollars! The game content nervous burn brain, logical reasoning part set fine seconds! Game links do not repeat, greatly meet the reasoning enthusiasts. Can you make it to the end? Come and try it! The game features 'Highly logical' : The player needs to capture every detail and reason, and be careful about every choice after reasoning. The slightest mistake could result in death 'Amazing characterization' : Eight different characters, each with their own secrets, are portrayed in multiple dimensions 'Multiple side stories' : many side stories, you can get unexpected harvest; 'Think-provoking content' : A quest full of adventure and the unknown as you follow the protagonist's perspective and uncover the truth behind it.

title: Tombstone MMO
description: [EARLY ACCESS] Tombstone MMO is not your typical MMORPG. Quests are scarce, your choices leave a meaningful impact on your character and the world around you, and you can navigate the game at your own discretion. With 20+ skills to train and several ways to progress, the game essentially adapts to your playstyle, whether you want to brute force it or cleverly get around things. If the main story doesn't interest you, you may carve your own path throughout the game. Whether it's to relax and do some life skills to build your bank or fight the toughest mutants and technomantic creatures for rare items and glory. Train 20+ different skills Several combat choices (melee, ranged, or energy weapons) Many gathering skills to harvest more and more items Many creation skills to use your harvested (or purchased items) to make rarer, more powerful and useful items Four different apocalyptic biomes to explore Two islands: Tutorial island that showcases everything to come, from using most of the skills to progress, to making game-changing decisions, to discovering hidden island secrets for more power. A main island that is much larger, full of more skilling content, monsters to fight and loot, more secrets, and more NPCs to discuss the world with. Make difficult decisions: Some decisions are semi-permanent and will affect how you play the game. Whether you do what's right or wrong, you set in stone your destiny in the lore and the gameplay loop. Player interaction such as trading, marketing, partying up, ganging up, and PVP NPC interactions such as buying, selling, Robbery, and charismatic conversations

title: Fuel Station Simulator
description: Fuel Station Simulator is a game where you can dive into the exciting world of entrepreneurship. Choose your own path of development and transform an abandoned gas station into a popular hub. Invest in upgrades and expansions, face various challenges, and attract both travelers and locals. Test your business skills and see if you have what it takes to succeed! Cashier Expand your business by opening a store and taking on the role of a cashier. Scan products, process payments, and boost your profits through excellent customer service. Store Management Design your store according to your own style and preferences. Arrange shelves, organize products, and create an attractive environment for customers. Drive and Explore On foot, you won't get far, but a car could change everything. Acquire a vehicle to easily travel between the many diverse locations on the expansive map. Handle deliveries yourself and explore the vast open world, discovering new opportunities and areas to expand your business. Develop and Expand Development is the key to success. Add more pumps and hire staff to serve multiple customers at once. Don't limit yourself to just a gas station—open a store, build restrooms, and more. Expenses will rise, but so will your income. Your task is to ensure that your revenues exceed your costs. Good luck!

title: Mystic Space
description: Mystic Space is a fast-paced high action game where you encounter deadly enemies with unique abilities through various waves. Fight your best to kill your enemies & achieve the highest score you can and upgrade your space ship as you proceed to next waves. Features: Various waves with different difficulties to play through. Plenty of enemies with own unique abilities. Ship upgrades: Combine your ideal gear to fight better. Compete against other players on the Steam leaderboard.

title: Orbital Siege
description: The skies are ablaze. An alien fleet pierces the atmosphere, its warships blotting out the sun. Cities crumble, defenses fall, and the planet teeters on the brink of annihilation. You are humanity’s last line of defense. One pilot. One ship. One chance to turn the tide. Orbital Siege fuses the classic arcade shooters with planetary defense, delivering relentless action. Key Features 🔥 Intense Shoot-'em-up Action: Survive 50 escalating enemy waves and take down 10 bosses. ⚙️ Upgrade & Defend: Boost firepower, speed, and shields with power-ups. Block enemy fire with defensive orbs, hunt foes with devastating lasers and homing missiles, and activate planetary turrets. 🎯 Dodge & Weave: Slip through storms of enemy fire with sharp precision. 🎨 Pixel-Perfect Retro Style: Vibrant pixel art that celebrates the golden age of arcade gaming.

title: panomap
description: panomap is an interactive geography game designed to be played alongside your Twitch chat! Immerse yourself in a thrilling adventure as you explore new destinations around the world, all while engaging with your viewers. As the streamer, you take on the role of the brave explorer, and it's up to everyone, including yourself, to guess your current location by typing their guesses in the chat. In each round, the game puts you to a random spot on the globe. Together, you and your audience must carefully observe the surroundings and gather clues to deduce your whereabouts. Once someone has a hunch, they can share their guess in the chat. Points are awarded to those who correctly guess your location, based on how quickly they respond. At the end, the player with the highest score wins! panomap is the perfect game to let your viewers brag about their remarkable geography knowledge and challenge one another. Have an interactive fun with your chat while testing your amazing geography skills. Please note that you need to have a Twitch account to play the game.

title: Desktop Companion
description: Desktop Companion is a customizable desktop assistant that lets you bring life to your screen. Import your own 2D or 3D models and turn them into interactive companions that live right on your desktop. Core Features: Custom Models – Add your own 2D gifs or full 3D characters. Mouse Interactions – Drag, throw, and play with your companion directly on your screen. Animations – Add life with custom animations. Animate idle states, movements, or reactions. Gravity & Physics – Enable gravity for fun and realistic motion. Let your model bounce around or fall naturally based on your desktop layout. Workshop - You can download others companions and share yours all within the Workshop. Note : The 2D and 3D models shown in the screenshots and trailer are for demonstration purposes only. They are not included in the application and serve only to showcase functionality.

title: Outgun
description: Outgun is a multiplayer capture the flag game, with minimalist graphics in 2D top-view. Inspired by classic shooters from the 90s like Quake and Doom, Outgun was created as an open source game in 2002 by Brazilian Fabiana Cecin (Spinal) and developed between 2003 and 2011 by Finnish Niko Ritari (Nix) and Jani Rivinoja (Huntta). Players are divided into two teams, with the goal of stealing the enemy's flag and bringing it to their base while protecting their own flag. The team with the most captured flags wins the match. Its simplicity makes room for fast-paced action and competitive team play, making Outgun have a strong fan base even 18 years after its launch. The game supports dedicated servers, bots, spectator mode and replays, as well as graphic and sound themes created by players.

title: Heroic Armored Company
description: Heroic Armored Company is a modern tank warfare game with advanced graphics technology, realistic battlefield environment and huge scenario map, which can bring players an exciting battlefield experience. The game is currently divided into story mode and mission mode. In story mode, you need to follow the story line to participate in different battles and gain experience, money and command authority according to your performance. In the mission mode, according to your experience, money and command authority, you can unlock different tanks, buy different ammunition, night vision, laser suppression system, active defense system and other different equipment, as well as command different tanks to complete the task in cooperation. Of course, the money used to buy ammunition is the virtual money in the game instead of real money, this game does not need to spend real money to buy equipment. Game Features ◆ Modern style battlefield background and armored vehicles. ◆ realistic battlefield effects, as if being in a real battlefield. ◆ Destructible vegetation and building system, day and night cycle system. ◆ Modular damage system, hitting different locations will produce different damage effects. ◆ Gain experience, money and enhance your command authority in the battle. ◆ In the mission mode, experience is used to unlock new tanks, money is used to buy different ammunition and additional equipment, and command authority is used to command different levels and numbers of teammates tanks to complete the mission in cooperation. This game is still in development, has completed the story mode 5 levels and mission mode 5 levels, later will gradually open new levels, and gradually increase the iconic main battle tanks of each country.

title: Area Cooperation Economic Simulation: North Korea (ACES)
description: Area Cooperation Economic Simulation: North Korea (ACES) simulates the development of North Korea's Pyongyang economy. This is an economic development simulation and not a game. Useful for an economics class. You make investments in infrastructure, security, education, workforce, food, production, or trade to grow the economy, and set tax rates. Bad weather, corruption or international grants will affect your policies. Citizens will be unhappy if your economic policies fail and will increase crime and instability of economy. Each ACES turn is one year and goes on for ten year period. At the end of each year key performance indicators and news reports are shown (After Action Report). At the end of ten years a graph shows ten-tear performance and your performance is evaluated (After Action Report). Diplomatic relations are improving with North Korea, South Korea and USA. North Korean Chairman Kim Jong-un said in his New Year 2019 speech economic development is the highest priority. ACES is a teaching tool to train officials to assist North Korea development.
